creator: m_ilya@agava.com
text:
g> [..skip..]

    g>  > Description:

    g> 	There are currently two ports for Emacs: editors/emacs, which
    g> 	installs the obsolete version 19.34, and editors/emacs20,
    g> 	which installs the current version 20.7.  Naive users are
    g> 	liable to install 19.34 by accident, because it seems to be
    g> 	the canonical port.

I wonder - is there any reason why we need emacs19 at all? Is there
anybody how use emacs19 instead emacs20 or xemacs?

    g> [..skip..]

-- 
Ilya Martynov
AGAVA Software Company, http://www.agava.com
